name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ Fully green Gucci logo bi-fold wallet. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic blue leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. Features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Blue leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo. Interior: eight card slots and two bill compartments.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ Fully green Gucci logo bi-fold wallet. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic blue leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. Features eight card slots and two bill compartments. Blue leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo. Interior: eight card slots and two bill compartments.
Model: 771148.
Open dimensions: 9cm (L) x 21cm (W)
Closed dimensions: 9cm (L) x 11cm (W)
Color: Blue/Original leather.
Made in Italy
Weight: approx. 0.45kg
